notes: Output captures the rough horizontal stack of multiple squid bodies but reduces them to traced mantle outlines with noisy photo-trace clutter and effectively no heads, eyes, arms, or suckers.
specific_issues: heads/eyes essentially missing on all individuals
arms and tentacles absent — no almond eye, no sucker rings
chromatophore field rendered as scribbly edge-trace artifacts of photo highlights, not sparse stipple
broken/discontinuous silhouettes where mantles meet head region
fins not articulated — terminal fin shape is a flat blunt outline rather than the diamond fin in the photo
reads as an edge-detector trace of the photo rather than an FAO scientific plate
only one rudimentary arm cluster visible on the bottom-right squid; other specimens are headless
internal lines are noise rather than purposeful anatomical hatching
